title: carpinus purpurinervis
intro: Carpinus purpurinervis, also known as the purple-veined hornbeam, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Japan and China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, helping to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Carpinus purpurinervis include reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine to treat various health conditions.
